title: CAMP KURATLI - 211info
text: SALVATION ARMY PORTLAND TABERNACLE CAMP KURATLI Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a Christian faith-based overnight summer camp at Trestle Glen in Boring, Oregon. 8495 SE Monterey Avenue Happy Valley, OR 97086 Eligibility: Ages 7-17 Hours: Varies Email (503) 239-1224 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 239-1224 Main phone Main phone (503) 239-1224 Intake (971) 888-7938 April Jacob [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: $425-$475, scholarships may be available DOCUMENTS: Application required AREA SERVED: Clackamas and Multnomah Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Entrance is on SE 85th Avenue Services: Camps Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FREE FOOD MARKET HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - SENIOR PRESCRIPTION DISCOUNT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
